name: Cream of Fresh Greens Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Head Lettuce Or Escarole, Finely Chopped
Salt, Nutmeg And White Pepper -- To Taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour 6 tablespoons olive oil into the soup pot and sauté the onion slightly. Add the chopped greens (lettuce or escarole, watercress, and spinach), potatoes, bouillon cubes, and water. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 15 minutes.
2. Blend the cooled soup until smooth and return it to the pot. Stir in the heavy cream and season with salt, nutmeg, white pepper, and paprika to taste. Reheat the soup gently and serve hot, garnishing each serving with a sprinkle of paprika.
